title: Data Protection by Default — Excessive Data Collection
description: Collecting more personal data than necessary for the stated purpose violates GDPR Article 25(2) (data protection by default) and Article 5(1)(c) (data minimisation).

finding.message: Potential excessive data collection at '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Select only the specific fields required for the current operation; avoid SELECT *.
Define explicit data schemas that expose only necessary attributes to each component.
Implement attribute-based access control to limit which fields each consumer can read.
GDPR Article 5(1)(c) mandates data minimisation: data must be adequate, relevant, and limited.
